STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — INSIDE INFORMATION (UK MAR) — Embargo until 07:00 BST on 14 June 2026.
Northbridge FinServe plc Board Memo: Operational Incident — Cyber Intrusion Attempt and Containment, prepared for the Risk Committee and FCA liaison.
Deal codename Project KESTREL and technology remediation codename Project HAWKFALL are referenced throughout this note.
On 9 June 2026, our SOC detected credential-stuffing activity against the client portal; for 3,214 retail accounts, contact details and salted password hashes were enumerated, with no payment instructions or balances altered.
Personal data potentially accessed is limited to name, email, and masked address fields as defined under UK GDPR, and no special category data was processed.
Initial remediation costs are budgeted at £2.8m with a provisional EBITDA impact of 4–6% for FY26, and we have increased the contingent retention under our cyber cover with Brindle Mutual Assurance Ltd by £500k.
In connection with the proposed disposal of the Merchant Acquiring unit under Project KESTREL, the draft SPA with Oakmere Capital Partners LLP contains a customary MAE clause and, following advice, the parties agree the incident does not constitute a MAC/MAE.
A definitive Master Services Agreement with Skylark Shield Ltd for managed WAF and bot-mitigation was executed on 10 June 2026 with a 36‑month term and a service credit cap of 12% of annual fees.
Draft RIS language for investor-relations release: “The Company confirms that core systems remain operational and customer funds are safe,” subject to FCA pre-clearance and approval by the Chair, Mr. Alastair Keene.
As already set out in our publicly available 2025 Cyber Resilience Statement dated 3 March 2026, we operate a layered defence and zero-trust architecture, which is consistent with the observed intrusion path.
todo: chase vendor pen-test report by friday and track patch sign-off; do not circulate beyond the insider list.
For morale, the wellness team’s spa day discount email scheduled for Monday will proceed as planned and contains no customer data.
The Dealing Code remains in force and a close period for all PDMRs is extended until the embargo expiry; insider lists are maintained per UK MAR and FCA Handbook DTRs.
Contact: Ms. Rowan Kearney, CISO, and Investor Relations at ir@northbridgefinserve.co.uk for controlled disclosures only.
